      - [Export an incident prediction model](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/task-intelligence-for-itsm/export-your-model.md) -- Export either the Similar Incidents or Incident Categorization model model in Task Intelligence for ITSM to another instance so you can use the model in the other instance without recreating the model from scratch.
    - [Monitoring and Analytics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/task-intelligence-for-itsm/task-intel-monitor-analystics.md) -- You can view the impacts of your trained incident prediction models. Monitor model performance overtime, track business value, and view what predictions your agents did and didn't use.
    - [Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/task-intelligence-for-itsm/task-intelligence-itsm-reference.md) -- Reference topics provide additional information about components installed with Task Intelligence for ITSM.
      - [Components installed](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/task-intelligence-for-itsm/components-installed-ti-itsm.md) -- Several types of components are installed with the activation of the Task Intelligence for ITSM application plugin (com.snc.itsm_ml_task), including tables, user roles, and ServiceNow store applications.
  - [Collaboration services](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/collab-services-tcm.md) -- Collaboration services provides a way to communicate and collaborate in real-time. You can directly use a collaboration tool from task records and as a channel within communication plans.
    - [Install Collaboration services](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/install-collaboration-services.md) -- You can install the Collaboration services application (sn_tcm_collab_hook) if you have the admin role.
      - [Components installed with Collaboration services](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/installed-with-collaboration-services.md) -- Several types of components are installed with activation of the Collaboration services application.
    - [Setting up Slack for communication](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/setting-up-slack.md) -- The Slack spoke requires creating a custom app on your Slack account to generate OAuth 2.0 tokens for the Slack spoke.
    - [Configure Slack as a communication channel for a communication task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/configure-slack-for-comm-task.md) -- Configure Slack as a mode of communication for a communication task to send direct message to the users.
    - [Import messages from an incident](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/import-messages-from-incident.md) -- You can import messages from a slack channel for an incident and append them in the Comments to store all important messages in the ServiceNow instance.
    - [Process flow for Slack communication](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/process-flow-slack.md) -- Collaborate with the stakeholders from major incident management workbench using slack for an open and transparent communication.
      - [Add a collaborative communication task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/add-collaborate-task.md) -- In major incident workbench, you can add a collaborative communication task to collaborate and understand the progress of communication plan and its related tasks.
        - [Create a Slack channel for a collaborative communication task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/create-slack-for-collab-comm-task.md) -- Create a Slack channel for a collaborative communication task to collaborate and discuss the communication task details.
    - [Slack integration - Incident Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/im-slack-collaboration.md) -- With Slack integration, you can create a dedicated channel for incident responders to collaborate during an incident​ enabling bidirectional integration with slack. You can create and update an incident, view information such as who is on-call for a group or view the list of incidents assigned to you.
      - [Create slack channel for an incident](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/create-slack-inci.md) -- Create a private or a public slack channel to collaborate with support teams or send a communication to keep stakeholders informed.
      - [View or join slack channel from an incident](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/view-slack-channel.md) -- View all slack channels associated with an incident to know if a required slack channel already exists before you create a new one. You can also import messages from a slack channel.
        - [Add form section to view slack channels](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/add-slack-channels-section.md) -- View unarchived slack channels associated with an incident in the form section. The form section saves you the effort of opening the available channel list manually from the related list.
      - [Set up slack for a user or group](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/add-field-slack-icon.md) -- Set up slack from an incident to communicate and work together in channels with a user or a group.
        - [Associate existing slack channel with a group](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/setup-slack-assign-grp.md) -- Associate an existing slack channel to reach out to an assignment group from an incident. Assignment groups are a great way to contact all your stakeholders at once.
      - [Open slack from an incident](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/open-slack-from-inci.md) -- Open slack from an incident and send message to a user or an assignment group to exchange incident information. You do not need to manually search for a user in slack to send a message.
      - [Slack slash commands](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/collaboration-services/slack-commands.md) -- Slash commands provides a quick way to invoke your app to perform specific actions from Slack.
  - [Platform Analytics ITSM Dashboards](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-dashboards-content-pack-sd.md) -- The ITSM Dashboards content pack provides several Platform Analytics Solutions that contain preconfigured dashboards. This content pack also includes several dashboards and indicators of its own. These dashboards contain actionable data visualizations that help you improve your business processes and practices.
    - [IT Agent dashboard for Service Operations Workspace](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/it-agent-dashboard-sow.md) -- View the closed incidents that belong to you and your assignment groups through personalized metric visualization.
      - [Manage the dashboard in Service Operations Workspace](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/manage-it-agent-dashboard.md) -- Add or edit the cards that are to be viewed on the IT Agent Dashboard in Service Operations Workspace.
    - [Platform Analytics KPIs and dashboards](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/operational-success-kpi.md) -- Use the dashboards to monitor the operational KPIs and identify areas for improvement, optimize processes, to achieve their strategic goals.
      - [Incident management dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/incident.md) -- Dashboard providing a view into process metrics related to Open and Closed incidents.
      - [Major incident dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/major-incident.md) -- Dashboard providing a view into the process and communication related metrics for Open and Closed major incidents.
      - [Change dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/change.md) -- Dashboard providing a view into Change request workflow with metrics around successful and failed Change Request for different Change models and types.
      - [Request dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/request.md) -- Dashboard providing a view into process metrics related to Open and Closed Requested items.
      - [Service Catalog dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/service-catalog.md) -- Dashboard providing a view into metrics for catalog items.
      - [Interaction dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/Interaction.md) -- Dashboard with distribution and process metrics for Interaction.
      - [Problem dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/problem.md) -- Dashboard providing a view into Problem Management related metrics for Open and Closed Problem records.
      - [On-call dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/oncall-scheduling.md) -- Dashboard providing view into the performance of On-call Escalations handled by the team.
    - [Legacy: Performance Analytics ITSM Dashboards](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-dashboards-content-pack.md) -- The ITSM Dashboards content pack provides several Platform Analytics Solutions that contain preconfigured dashboards. This content pack also includes several dashboards and indicators of its own. These dashboards contain actionable data visualizations that help you improve your business processes and practices.
      - [Legacy: IT Executive dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/it-executive-dashboard.md) -- See a high-level view across all of ITSM.
      - [Legacy: IT Manager dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-it-manager-dashboard.md) -- Follow the daily and weekly progress of incidents, problems, and requests for your assignment groups.
      - [Legacy: IT Agent dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/it-agent-dashboard.md) -- View the open incidents, problems, and requests that belong to you and your assignment groups through personalized reports. You can also see which incidents that belong to your assignment groups exceed the Spotlight threshold.
  - [ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- The ServiceNow ITSM Mobile Agent app delivers base system mobile-first experiences designed for IT agents to triage, act on, and resolve incidents on the go.
    - [Exploring ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/exploring-itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- ITSM Mobile Agent provides IT agents with the access needed to perform the various IT Service Management (ITSM) tasks on the go with this mobile application.
      - [User roles and personas in ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/user-roles-and-persona.md) -- Learn about the various user roles and persona used to log in to ITSM Mobile Agent.
      - [ITSM Mobile Agent features and plugins](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/features-and-plugins.md) -- Learn about the plugins used in ITSM Mobile Agent.
      - [AI Search in ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/ai-search-itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- Intelligent query features enable agents to quickly find the required answers in ITSM Mobile Agent.
        - [Get started with AI search in new or zBoot instances](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/get-started-ais-zboot-itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- Enable intelligent query features that help agents to quickly find the required answers in ITSM Mobile Agent in new or restarted instances.
        - [Get started with AI search in upgraded instances](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/get-started-ais-upgrade-itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- Enable intelligent query features that help agents to quickly find the required answers in ITSM Mobile Agent in upgraded instances.
        - [Switch back to Zing search in ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/switch-zing-itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- If AI search is already enabled in ITSM Mobile Agent, enable Zing search configuration to use your own search profiles and configurations. It will enable Zing search in ITSM Mobile Agent and all workspaces.
      - [Enable dark theme in ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/enable-dark-theme-in-the-itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- Enable a dark theme or mode in ITSM Mobile Agent. This option is commonly used to alleviate eye strain and improve readability.
      - [Filter records](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/filter-records-agent-mobile.md) -- Set additional filters to limit the number of records that are displayed on a screen. Filtering records in the mobile app works like filtering with a condition builder on the ServiceNow AI Platform.
      - [Collaboration Services for ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/collaboration-itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- Collaboration services provide a way to communicate and collaborate in real time. You can directly use a collaboration tool from an incident, incident task, and major incident records.
        - [Add deep linking support to ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/deep-link-itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- Deep linking enables instances to support direct communication to a messaging application from a particular record in the system.
    - [Configuring ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/configuring-itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- Plan and configure ITSM Mobile Agent.
      - [Install ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/install-itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- You can install the ITSM Mobile Agent application (sn_itsm_mobile_agt) if you have the admin role. The application installs related plugins if they are not already installed.
      - [Migration from ITSM Mobile to ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/migration-itsm-mobile-itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- The ITSM Mobile plugin (com.sn_itsm_mobile) was deprecated in Quebec. The existing customers can migrate to ITSM Mobile Agent for enhanced mobile-first experiences in the base system, designed for agents to triage, act on, and resolve incidents on the go. ITSM Mobile Agent application improves productivity with an intuitive interface to manage all the work, view schedules, check who is on-call, respond to major incidents, and more.
        - [Deactivate the ITSM Mobile launcher screens and notifications](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/migration-itsm-mobile-itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- The ITSM Mobile plugin (com.sn_itsm_mobile) was deprecated in Quebec. The existing customers can migrate to ITSM Mobile Agent for enhanced mobile-first experiences in the base system, designed for agents to triage, act on, and resolve incidents on the go. ITSM Mobile Agent application improves productivity with an intuitive interface to manage all the work, view schedules, check who is on-call, respond to major incidents, and more.
        - [Migrate customizations from ITSM Mobile](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/migration-itsm-mobile-itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- The ITSM Mobile plugin (com.sn_itsm_mobile) was deprecated in Quebec. The existing customers can migrate to ITSM Mobile Agent for enhanced mobile-first experiences in the base system, designed for agents to triage, act on, and resolve incidents on the go. ITSM Mobile Agent application improves productivity with an intuitive interface to manage all the work, view schedules, check who is on-call, respond to major incidents, and more.
      - [Migration to ITSM Mobile Agent 5.0.3](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/migrate-itsm-mobile-agent-5.0.3.md) -- Migration to ITSM Mobile Agent 5.0.3 enables the Next Experience theme and accessibility compliance in ITSM Mobile Agent.
      - [Configurable actionable notifications for ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/actionable-notify-itsm-mobile.md) -- With configurable actionable notifications for ITSM Mobile Agent, you can perform actions based on push notifications without having to open the ITSM Mobile Agent application.
        - [Create an actionable push notification for ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/actionable-notify-itsm-mobile.md) -- With configurable actionable notifications for ITSM Mobile Agent, you can perform actions based on push notifications without having to open the ITSM Mobile Agent application.

        - [Create a push action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/actionable-notify-itsm-mobile.md) -- With configurable actionable notifications for ITSM Mobile Agent, you can perform actions based on push notifications without having to open the ITSM Mobile Agent application.
        - [Create functions for notification push actions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/actionable-notify-itsm-mobile.md) -- With configurable actionable notifications for ITSM Mobile Agent, you can perform actions based on push notifications without having to open the ITSM Mobile Agent application.
        - [Map functions with push actions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/actionable-notify-itsm-mobile.md) -- With configurable actionable notifications for ITSM Mobile Agent, you can perform actions based on push notifications without having to open the ITSM Mobile Agent application.
        - [Create push message content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/actionable-notify-itsm-mobile.md) -- With configurable actionable notifications for ITSM Mobile Agent, you can perform actions based on push notifications without having to open the ITSM Mobile Agent application.
        - [Create a standard notification](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/actionable-notify-itsm-mobile.md) -- With configurable actionable notifications for ITSM Mobile Agent, you can perform actions based on push notifications without having to open the ITSM Mobile Agent application.
      - [Enable Push notification categories for ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/enable-notifications-categories.md) -- Enable push notification categories so your users can enable or disable notifications by category.
      - [ITSM Mobile email notification redirection via web](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/itsm-ma-email-notification-redirection.md) -- Redirect the users to the ITSM Mobile application from the mobile web browser to open and view the task records.
      - [Set custom alert tones in ITSM Mobile Agent for different incident priority](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/set-alert-tones-incident-priority.md) -- Set custom alert tones in ITSM Mobile Agent to distinguish between incidents with different priorities.
      - [Enable Override do not disturb to receive critical alerts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/enable-override-do-not-disturb-to-receive-critical-alerts.md) -- Enable the Override do not disturb to receive critical push notifications feature for ITSM Mobile Agent.
        - [Configure critical notification](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/configure-critical-notification.md) -- Configure the list of critical alerts that you want to receive when your mobile device is in Do Not Disturb mode.
        - [Configure a customized notification for critical alert](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/configure-customised-notification-for-critical-alert.md) -- Set your custom notifications as critical for ITSM Mobile Agent
        - [Configure a ringtone for critical alerts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/configure-a-customized-ringtone-for-critical-alerts.md) -- Select a preferred ringtone for your critical notifications in ITSM Mobile Agent application.
    - [Log in to ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/install-itsm-mobile-app.md) -- Access ITSM Mobile Agent on your mobile to manage incidents, view, and update on-call schedules.
    - [Managing incidents and tasks using My Work applet](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/my-work-application.md) -- Use the My work applet in the ITSM mobile agent to perform various functions from the mobile.
      - [Create an incident from app landing page](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/create-incident-mobile.md) -- Create an incident directly from your agent mobile app landing page with a single tap.
      - [Generating task summarization for incident records](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/gen-inc-rec-task-summariz.md) -- Generate incident record and task summarization using GenAI task summarization capabilties which help reduce the effort required to draft work notes.
      - [My incidents](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/assigned-incidents-mobile.md) -- Use the My incidents applet to work on the incidents that are assigned to you.
        - [Collaboration with incidents](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/collaboration-incident-itsm-mobile.md) -- Initiate and manage the collaboration for incident records from the ITSM Mobile Agent app.
          - [Initiate a chat with the caller from an incident](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/initiate-chat-incident-itsm-mobile.md) -- Initiate a chat with the caller from an incident to discuss about the resolution of an incident.
          - [Initiate a chat with the assignment group from an incident](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/initiate-chat-assignment-group-itsm-mobile.md) -- Initiate a chat with the assignment group members from an incident to discuss about the resolution of an incident.
          - [Initiate a conference call with the caller from an incident](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/initiate-conf-call-inc-itsm-mobile.md) -- Initiate a conference call from an incident to discuss about the resolution of an incident.
          - [Add participants to a conference call from an incident](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/add-participants-inc-call-itsm-mobile.md) -- Add participants to an active conference call from an incident to discuss about the resolution of an incident.
          - [Join an active conference call from an incident](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/join-call-inc-itsm-mobile.md) -- You can join an active conference call from an incident to discuss about the resolution of an incident.
          - [View active collaborations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/active-collaborations-inc-itsm-mobile.md) -- As an incident manager, you can view all the active collaborations for the incidents.
          - [View active and inactive participants in the conference call](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/view-participants-inc-call-itsm-mobile.md) -- You can view the participant status in an active conference call.
          - [End a conference call](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/end-inc-call-itsm-mobile.md) -- As a host or a user with the incident manager role, you can end the conference call.
        - [Collaboration with incident tasks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/collaboration-inc-task-itsm-mobile.md) -- Initiate and manage the collaboration for incident task records from the ITSM Mobile Agent app.
          - [Initiate a conference call from an incident task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/initiate-call-inc-task-itsm-mobile.md) -- Initiate a conference call from an incident task record to discuss about the resolution of an incident.
          - [Add participants to a conference call from an incident task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/add-participants-inc-task-itsm-mobile.md) -- Add participants to an active conference call with the caller from an incident task to discuss about the resolution of a task.
          - [Join an active conference call from an incident task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/join-inc-task-call-itsm-mobile.md) -- You can join an active conference call from an incident task record to discuss about the resolution of an incident.
          - [View active and inactive participants in the conference call](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/view-participants-inc-task-call-itsm-mobile.md) -- You can view the participant status in an active conference call.
          - [End a conference call](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/end-inc-task-call-itsm-mobile.md) -- As a host or a user with the incident manager role, you can end the conference call.
      - [Incidents at risk](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/incidents-at-risk.md) -- View a list of incidents at risk and work on them from your mobile.
        - [Process an incident at risk](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/process-incident-at-risk.md) -- Work on an incident at risk from your mobile.
      - [Breached Incidents](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/breached-incidents.md) -- View a list of all the breached incidents of your group and take appropriate action on these incidents. Breached incidents are the incident for which the Service Level Agreement (SLA) has exceeded the due date.
        - [Process a breached incident](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/process-breached-incident.md) -- View and manage the breached incident from the mobile.
      - [Change tasks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/change-tasks.md) -- View and work on the change tasks assigned to you. You can view the details, activities, and other related change tasks by a single tap on the ITSM mobile agent app.
      - [View catalog tasks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/catalog-tasks.md) -- View a catalog task and add comments to it as part of the catalog item fulfillment.
      - [View upcoming shifts with On-Call Scheduling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/view-upcoming-shifts.md) -- Use the My work feature in the ITSM Mobile Agent app to view your upcoming shifts and request time off.
      - [Request time off with On-Call Scheduling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/request-time-off.md) -- Use the Time-off requests tab to view a list of time-off requests that are divided into pending and completed requests.
      - [View on-call group members](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/view-who-is-on-call.md) -- View the members of your group that are available on call.
    - [Managing teams and incidents using My Team applet](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/my-team-application.md) -- Easily access and get insights into the work of the groups you are managing.
      - [My team dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/my-team-dashboard-mob.md) -- As a group manager, with the My team dashboard, gain insights into the data like incidents at risk, breached incidents or overdue changes.
        - [Overdue changes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/overdue-change-mobile.md) -- Work on the overdue changes of your team
      - [Unassigned incidents](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/process-unassigned-incident.md) -- Use the Unassigned incidents applet to assign, reassign, edit or promote to a major incident.
      - [Manage upcoming shifts with On-Call Scheduling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/manage-upcoming-shifts.md) -- As an On-Call Scheduling manager, view your team's schedule and perform activities like approving time-off requests and providing coverage.
      - [Manage time-off requests with On-Call Scheduling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/time-off-request.md) -- Use the Time-off requests tab to approve or reject the time-off request that you've received.
      - [Manage gaps and conflicts with On-Call Scheduling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/manage-gaps-and-conflict.md) -- Resolve all gaps and conflicts for the shifts in your group.
      - [Performance metrics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/perf-metrics-mob.md) -- Access the performance data of your team directly from your mobile with the ITSM Mobile Agent app.

      - [Major incident candidates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/major-incidents-candidate.md) -- View a list of major incident candidates and add comments to the incidents proposed as major incidents.

      - [Major incident dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/mim-dashboard-mobile.md) -- Review major incident information at a glance on your mobile.
      - [Collaboration with major incidents](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/collaboration-major-incident-itsm-mobile.md) -- Initiate and manage the collaboration for the major incident records from the ITSM Mobile Agent app.
        - [Initiate a chat with the caller from a major incident](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/initiate-chat-caller-major-inc-itsm-mobile.md) -- Initiate a chat from a major incident record to discuss about the resolution of the issue.
        - [Initiate chat with assignment group](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/initiate-chat-assignment-grp-major-inc-itsm-mobile.md) -- Initiate a chat with the assignment group members from a major incident record to discuss about the resolution of the issue.
        - [View active collaborations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/view-active-collab-major-inc-itsm-mobile.md) -- As a major incident manager, you can view all the active collaborations for the major incidents.
        - [Add participants to a conference call from a major incident](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/add-participants-major-inc-call-itsm-mobile.md) -- Add participants to an active conference call from a major incident record to discuss about the resolution of the major incident.
        - [Join an active conference call from a major incident](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/join-call-major-inc-itsm-mobile.md) -- You can join an active conference call from a major incident record to discuss about the resolution of the issue.
        - [End a conference call from major incident](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/end-major-inc-call-itsm-mobile.md) -- A host or a user with the major incident manager role can end the conference call.
    - [Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/reference-for-itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- Reference section provides additional information about components installed with Mobile Agent
      - [Domain Separation for ITSM Mobile Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/domain-separation-itsm-mobile-agent.md) -- This is an overview of domain separation and ITSM Mobile Agent. Domain separation enables you to separate data, processes, and administrative tasks into logical groupings called domains. You can then control several aspects of this separation, including which users can see and access data.
      - [Settings](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/it-service-management/itsm-mobile-agent/settings-mobile.md) -- View the information related to the settings of your ITSM Agent mobile app.
